title: kuhlhasseltia muricata
intro: Kuhlhasseltia muricata, also known as the "Coral Root Orchid," is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to the Himalayas. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which are said to include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Kuhlhasseltia muricata is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying and powdering the roots, which can then be used to make teas or capsules for medicinal purposes.
